meta.title: 传统智慧与现代应用
meta.description: Advanced native-level discourse on traditional wisdom in Chinese: idioms, selective inheritance, and formal comparative/causal grammar.
meta.description_ko: 격조 높은 원어민 수준의 전통 지혜 담화: 성어, 선택적 계승, 격식체 비교·인과 문형.

explanation.en: 「古为今用」is an idiom meaning "to apply ancient wisdom to modern circumstances".
explanation.ko: 「古为今用」는 '옛것을 오늘에 활용하다'라는 뜻의 성어이다.

questions.prompt: 「古为今用」是什么意思？(What does 古为今用 mean?)
choices: 古为今用(applying ancient wisdom to contemporary use)

explanation.en: This idiom means "absorbing the valuable essence while discarding the outdated dross".
explanation.ko: 이 성어는 '정수를 취하고 찌꺼기는 버린다'는 뜻으로, 가치 있는 것만 취하고 낡은 것은 버린다는 의미이다.

questions.prompt: 「取其精华，去其糟粕」是什么意思？(What does 取其精华，去其糟粕 mean?)
choices: 汲取有价值的精华，摒弃过时无用的糟粕(absorbing the valuable essence while discarding the outdated dross)

explanation.en: 「中庸之道」refers to the Confucian philosophy of moderation, avoiding extremes.
explanation.ko: 「中庸之道」는 극단을 피하는 유교적 '중용의 도'를 뜻한다.

questions.prompt: 「中庸之道」是什么意思？(What does 中庸之道 mean?)
choices: 不偏不倚、恰到好处的处世哲学(a philosophy of moderation, avoiding extremes)

explanation.en: 「与时俱进」is an idiom meaning "to keep pace with the times, advancing along with them".
explanation.ko: 「与时俱进」는 '시대와 함께 발전하다'라는 뜻의 성어이다.

questions.prompt: 「与时俱进」是什么意思？(What does 与时俱进 mean?)
choices: 随着时代的发展而不断进步、更新(advancing and updating along with the times)

explanation.en: This refers to combining ancient thought with modern practice to give it new relevance.
explanation.ko: 이는 고대 사상을 현대 실천과 결합해 새로운 시대적 의미를 부여하는 것을 뜻한다.

questions.prompt: 「传统智慧的现代转化」通常指什么？(What does the modern transformation of traditional wisdom usually refer to?)
choices: 将古代思想与现代实践相结合，赋予其新的时代内涵(combining ancient thought with modern practice, giving it new contemporary meaning)

explanation.en: 「古为今用」means "applying ancient wisdom to modern use".
explanation.ko: 「古为今用」는 '옛것을 오늘에 활용하다'라는 뜻이다.

questions.prompt: 许多企业管理者从《孙子兵法》中汲取智慧，实现___，运用到现代商业竞争中。(Many business managers draw wisdom from "The Art of War," applying ancient wisdom to modern use in contemporary business competition.)

explanation.en: This idiom means selectively absorbing valuable parts while discarding outdated ones.
explanation.ko: 이 성어는 가치 있는 것을 취하고 낡은 것은 버린다는 뜻이다.

questions.prompt: 对待传统文化，我们应该秉持___的态度，理性继承而非全盘接受。(In dealing with traditional culture, we should uphold the attitude of "taking the essence, discarding the dross," rationally inheriting rather than accepting everything wholesale.)

explanation.en: 「中庸之道」refers to the philosophy of moderation.
explanation.ko: 「中庸之道」는 '중용의 도'를 뜻한다.

questions.prompt: 面对纷繁复杂的人际关系，___依然为现代人提供了宝贵的处世智慧。(Facing complex interpersonal relationships, the doctrine of the mean still provides valuable wisdom for modern people on how to conduct themselves.)

explanation.en: 「与时俱进」means "to advance along with the times".
explanation.ko: 「与时俱进」는 '시대와 함께 발전하다'라는 뜻이다.

questions.prompt: 传统文化要想在当代社会焕发新的生机，就必须___，不断创新表达方式。(For traditional culture to regain vitality in contemporary society, it must keep pace with the times, continuously innovating its forms of expression.)

explanation.en: This describes combining ancient thought with modern practice.
explanation.ko: 이는 고대 사상을 현대 실천과 결합하는 것을 뜻한다.

questions.prompt: 许多学者致力于研究___，探索如何让古老的哲学思想服务于当下的社会问题。(Many scholars are dedicated to studying the modern transformation of traditional wisdom, exploring how ancient philosophical thought can serve contemporary social issues.)
choices: 将古代思想与现代实践相结合，赋予其新的时代内涵

explanation.en: 「折射」means "to reflect/mirror".
explanation.ko: 「折射」는 '반영하다'라는 뜻이다.

questions.prompt: 这场关于传统文化复兴的讨论___了当代社会对精神家园的深切渴求。(This discussion about the revival of traditional culture reflects contemporary society's deep yearning for a spiritual homeland.)

explanation.en: 「与其〜不如〜」means "rather than 〜, it's better to 〜".
explanation.ko: 「与其〜不如〜」는 '~하느니 차라리 ~하는 게 낫다'는 뜻이다.

questions.prompt: 与其对传统文化不加分辨地全盘继承，___不如运用批判性思维加以扬弃。(Rather than inheriting traditional culture wholesale without discrimination, it's better to apply critical thinking to selectively preserve and discard.)

explanation.en: 「即使〜也〜」means "even if 〜, still 〜".
explanation.ko: 「即使〜也〜」는 '설령 ~일지라도 ~하다'는 뜻이다.

questions.prompt: 这些古老的智慧___历经了数千年的岁月洗礼，___依然在当代社会闪耀着独特的光芒。(Even though this ancient wisdom has undergone the test of thousands of years, it still shines with a unique brilliance in contemporary society.)

explanation.en: 「之所以〜是因为〜」emphasizes the reason.
explanation.ko: 「之所以〜是因为〜」는 이유를 강조한다.

questions.prompt: 传统智慧之所以能够历久弥新，___是因为它触及了人类共通的生存与处世哲学。(The reason traditional wisdom can remain fresh over time is precisely because it touches on philosophies of survival and conduct common to all humanity.)

explanation.en: 「一旦〜就〜」means "once 〜, then 〜".
explanation.ko: 「一旦〜就〜」는 '일단 ~하면 곧 ~하다'는 뜻이다.

questions.prompt: 一种思想一旦被赋予了新的时代内涵，___能够焕发出崭新的生命力。(Once an idea is given new contemporary meaning, it can burst forth with fresh vitality.)

explanation.en: 「归根结底〜还是〜」emphasizes the fundamental point.
explanation.ko: 「归根结底〜还是〜」는 근본적인 요점을 강조한다.

questions.prompt: 归根结底，传统智慧能否在现代社会发挥作用___取决于我们如何进行创造性转化。(In the final analysis, whether traditional wisdom can play a role in modern society still depends on how we carry out creative transformation.)

explanation.en: 「共同」means "jointly/together".
explanation.ko: 「共同」는 '함께'라는 뜻이다.

questions.prompt: 由此可见，古人的智慧与现代的实践___孕育了充满生命力的文化创新。(From this we can see that both ancient wisdom and modern practice jointly give birth to culturally innovative creations full of vitality.)

explanation.en: 「往往」means "often/frequently".
explanation.ko: 「往往」는 '흔히'라는 뜻이다.

questions.prompt: 众所周知，经典古籍中蕴含的智慧___能够为现代人解决当下难题提供启示。(As everyone knows, the wisdom embedded in classical texts often provides inspiration for modern people to solve present-day problems.)

explanation.en: 「诠释」(quánshì) means "to interpret/explicate".
explanation.ko: 「诠释」(quánshì)는 '해석하다, 풀이하다'라는 뜻이다.

questions.prompt: 这位学者致力于___古代哲学思想，使其焕发现代活力。(This scholar is dedicated to reinterpreting ancient philosophical thought, giving it modern vitality.)

explanation.en: 「往往」means "often".
explanation.ko: 「往往」는 '흔히'라는 뜻이다.

questions.prompt: 古人的养生之道___蕴含着朴素而深刻的科学道理。(The ancients' wisdom on health preservation often contains simple yet profound scientific principles.)

explanation.en: 「不如」must come before the verb phrase 运用批判性思维〜: 不如运用 (not 运用不如).
explanation.ko: 「不如」는 동사구 '运用批判性思维〜' 앞에 와야 하므로 '不如运用'이 맞다.

questions.prompt: 与其对传统文化不加分辨地全盘继承，运用不如批判性思维加以扬弃。(Rather than inheriting traditional culture wholesale without discrimination, it's better to apply critical thinking to selectively preserve and discard.) — find the error
choices: 与其对传统文化不加分辨地全盘继承，不如运用批判性思维加以扬弃。
与其对传统文化不加分辨地全盘继承，运用不如批判性思维加以扬弃。
与其对传统文化不加分辨地全盘继承，不如批判性思维运用加以扬弃。
与其对传统文化不加分辨地全盘继承，运用批判性思维不如加以扬弃。

explanation.en: The fixed pattern requires 是因为 in that order, not 因为是.
explanation.ko: 고정 문형은 '因为是'가 아니라 '是因为' 순서여야 한다.

questions.prompt: 传统智慧之所以能够历久弥新，因为是它触及了人类共通的生存与处世哲学。(The reason traditional wisdom can remain fresh over time is precisely because it touches on philosophies of survival and conduct common to all humanity.) — find the error
choices: 传统智慧之所以能够历久弥新，是因为它触及了人类共通的生存与处世哲学。
传统智慧之所以能够历久弥新，因为是它触及了人类共通的生存与处世哲学。
传统智慧之所以能够历久弥新，是它因为触及了人类共通的生存与处世哲学。
传统智慧之所以能够历久弥新，它是因为触及了人类共通的生存与处世哲学。

explanation.en: 「一旦〜就〜」is the correct fixed pattern; 「才」does not match the immediate consequence implied by 一旦.
explanation.ko: 「一旦〜就〜」가 올바른 고정 문형이며 「才」는 '一旦'의 즉각적 결과와 맞지 않는다.

questions.prompt: 一种思想一旦被赋予了新的时代内涵，能够才焕发出崭新的生命力。(Once an idea is given new contemporary meaning, it can burst forth with fresh vitality.) — find the error
choices: 一种思想一旦被赋予了新的时代内涵，就能够焕发出崭新的生命力。
一种思想一旦被赋予了新的时代内涵，能够才焕发出崭新的生命力。
一种思想一旦被赋予了新的时代内涵，才能够焕发出崭新的生命力。
一种思想一旦被赋予了新的时代内涵，能够焕发出才崭新的生命力。

explanation.en: The sentence reads: 与其对传统文化不加分辨地全盘继承，不如运用批判性思维加以扬弃 ("Rather than inheriting traditional culture wholesale without discrimination, it's better to apply critical thinking to selectively preserve and discard").
explanation.ko: 문장은 '与其对传统文化不加分辨地全盘继承，不如运用批判性思维加以扬弃' (전통 문화를 무분별하게 전면 계승하느니 차라리 비판적 사고를 활용해 취사선택하는 게 낫다)가 된다.

questions.prompt: 与其对传统文化不加分辨地全盘继承，__________批判性思维加以扬弃。(Rather than inheriting traditional culture wholesale without discrimination, it's better to apply critical thinking to selectively preserve and discard.)

explanation.en: The sentence reads: 一种思想一旦被赋予了新的时代内涵，就能够焕发出崭新的生命力 ("Once an idea is given new contemporary meaning, it can burst forth with fresh vitality").
explanation.ko: 문장은 '一种思想一旦被赋予了新的时代内涵，就能够焕发出崭新的生命力' (사상은 일단 새로운 시대적 함의를 부여받으면 참신한 생명력을 발산할 수 있다)가 된다.

questions.prompt: 一种思想一旦被赋予了新的时代内涵，__________焕发出崭新的生命力。(Once an idea is given new contemporary meaning, it can burst forth with fresh vitality.)
